description: This map displays Natura 2000 (N2K) sites as light blue polygons and their surrounding Natura 2000 Area of Interest (N2K AoI) as salmon-coloured polygons, which represent a 2km buffer around the N2K sites. The geographic area is located in France, evidenced by the "FR" prefix in the N2K site codes. Multiple N2K sites are labelled with codes: FR7200684, FR7200683, FR7200685, FR7200686, and FR7200682. The map illustrates that an N2K AoI polygon can encompass one or more individual N2K sites; for instance, the AoI in the upper right contains two FR7200684 sites, and the larger AoI in the lower right contains both FR7200685 and FR7200686 sites. Conversely, three distinct FR7200683 sites are shown, each with its own separate 2km buffered AoI. No scale bar, compass, legend, or explicit data source/year is visible.
